items.title: Jayson Tatum, Nikola Jokic Named NBA's Players Of Week 23
items.blurb: Jayson Tatum, Nikola Jokic Named NBA's Players Of Week 23 — Jayson Tatum and Nikola Jokic have been named the NBA's Players of the Week for Week 23. Tatum averaged 25.7 points, 9.7 rebounds and 6.7 assists as the Boston Celtics went 3-0. items.title: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday
items.blurb: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday —   Los Angeles Clippers guard James Harden entered Monday’s matchup against the Philadelphia 76ers needing just one point to reach a significant career milestone. The Clippers fell to Philadelphia in a closely contested game at the Wells Fargo Center on Tuesday, but Harden delivered 28 points along with six rebounds and five assists.

items.title: Lucas Williamson, Girzzlies Sign 10-Day Contract
items.blurb: Lucas Williamson, Girzzlies Sign 10-Day Contract — Wing Lucas Williamson has signed a 10-day contract with the Memphis Grizzlies. items.title: TC Swirsky To Join Mercury As Assistant
items.blurb: TC Swirsky To Join Mercury As Assistant — Washington Wizards' assistant coach TC Swirsky is set to join Nate Tibbetts' staff with the Phoenix Mercury, reported Michael Scotto of HoopsHype. Swirsky was previously the head coach of the G League's Memphis Hustle.

items.title: Anthony Davis Cleared For Light Contact
items.blurb: Anthony Davis Cleared For Light Contact — The Washington Wizards cleared Anthony Davis for light contact, the team announced on Tuesday. Davis has been out due to ligament damage in his left hand. Davis has appeared in 20 games this season. The Wizards are currently 17-58 and tied for the worst record in the league.
